title: APD identifies man shot by officers during Sunday night domestic violence call in SW Albuquerque
description: Albuquerque police have identified Dwayne Wilson, 53, as the man shot by officers during a domestic violence call Sunday evening. Wilson faces charges including kidnapping and aggravated battery after allegedly assaulting his girlfriend and threatening her life.

title: Amanda Anisimova returns to action, win first-round match in Paris
description: Amanda Anisimova needed some time to shake off the rust on Monday during her first-round match at the French Open. It was nine weeks to the day that Anisimova last played a competitive match.

title: 19 injured during reported stampede near Myrtle Beach, officials say
description: Officials said it appears a stampede at Bike Fest near Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, was triggered when some started running, sparking a chain reaction within the crowd.

title: Podcast explores UCD student's perplexing 2001 death
description: In January 2001, UC Davis student Andrew Wieman died after suffering 29 knife wounds while inside his bedroom at an on-campus fraternity house. Yolo County authorities determined they were self-inflicted and ruled his death a suicide.

title: Casio's silver-dial Edifice watch hits all-time low price of only $72 on Amazon, down 40%
description: Deal | The silver-dial Casio Edifice EFV160D-7AV has dropped to its all-time low of $72 on Amazon — 25% off its typical $96 price. It shares the same Clous de Paris textured dial and 40 mm slim build as the black-dial 1AV, but with a quieter, more formal all-silver look.
